arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Barnsley - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Birmingham City and Barnsley, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Jay Stansfield's late penalty at Bristol Rovers made it a sensational six wins on the bounce for Birmingham to leave them on the brink of promotion. The Blues, unbeaten at home all season, need just ...

arts.ttl: Birmingham City reveal £16m loss and £100m Knighthead agreement
arts.sum: Knighthead’s investment and improved revenue streams saw Blues make £28.7m last season as they were relegated from the Championship. The accounts report that Knighthead have spent almost £9m on improvements to St Andrew’s and the club’s training facilities since the end of last season.
